reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para hacer un alto en el viaje, muy arbolado con mesas y bancos para descansar y comer algo o tomar mate.

(Translated by Google)
A good place to stop on the journey, very wooded with tables and benches to rest and eat something or drink mate.

reviews.comment:
Es una tradición detenernos, cargar nafta y almorzar ahi...sobre todo la parte de parrilla ...podrian bajar los precios un poquito ....

(Translated by Google)
It's a tradition for us to stop, fill up with gas, and have lunch there...especially the grilled food...they could lower the prices a little....
